note: Edit this file to add or update meetings. Status values: upcoming, minutes, cancelled.

bodies.name: Board of Commissioners
bodies.description: Durham County's five elected commissioners set the county property tax rate and adopt the county's annual operating budget. (The City of Durham sets a separate city tax rate independently.)
bodies.location: 200 E. Main St., Durham, Commissioners Chambers, Room 2A

bodies.name: Durham City Council
bodies.description: The seven-member City Council sets city policy, adopts the city budget, and appoints the city manager.
bodies.location: 101 City Hall Plaza, Durham, Council Chambers

bodies.name: DPS Board of Education
bodies.description: The elected DPS Board of Education governs Durham Public Schools, hires the superintendent, and sets the schools budget.
bodies.location: Durham Public Schools, 511 Cleveland St., Durham

bodies.name: City-County Planning Commission
bodies.description: Reviews rezoning petitions, subdivision plans, and long-range land use policy for both the City and County.
bodies.location: 101 City Hall Plaza, Durham, Committee Room

bodies.name: Board of Adjustment
bodies.description: Hears appeals of zoning decisions and grants variances from development regulations.
bodies.location: 101 City Hall Plaza, Durham, Committee Room

bodies.name: Alliance Health Board of Directors
bodies.description: Governing board for Alliance Health, overseeing mental health, IDD, and substance use services across Durham, Wake, Cumberland, and Johnston counties.
bodies.location: 501 Willard Street, Durham

links.label: From the Desk of the County Manager, March 27, 2026

bodies.name: Durham Housing Authority Board
bodies.description: Governs the Durham Housing Authority, which administers public housing and Section 8 vouchers for low-income Durham neighbors.
bodies.location: 330 E. Main St., Durham

bodies.name: Civilian Police Review Board
bodies.description: Reviews civilian complaints and matters related to police conduct in the City of Durham.
bodies.location: 101 City Hall Plaza, Durham, Conference Room 1A

bodies.name: Racial Equity Commission
bodies.description: City-County joint commission that examines and advocates for policies to eliminate systemic inequities and racism in Durham.
bodies.location: Virtual (Zoom)

bodies.name: Environmental Affairs Board
bodies.description: Advises City Council and BOCC on watershed protection, air quality, energy conservation, and related environmental matters.
bodies.location: 101 City Hall Plaza, Durham, Committee Room

bodies.name: Historic Preservation Commission
bodies.description: Holds quasi-judicial hearings on exterior changes to historic district or landmark properties.
bodies.location: 101 City Hall Plaza, Durham, Committee Room

bodies.name: Bicycle & Pedestrian Advisory Commission
bodies.description: Citizen advisory group providing guidance on bicycle and pedestrian infrastructure to City Council and BOCC.
bodies.location: City Hall or Zoom

bodies.name: Workers' Rights Commission
bodies.description: City commission focused on worker advocacy and protection of worker rights in Durham.
bodies.location: 101 City Hall Plaza, Durham, Conference Room 1A

bodies.name: Board of Health
bodies.description: Policy-making and rule-making body for Durham County's Department of Public Health.
bodies.location: Virtual (open to public)

bodies.name: Library Board of Trustees
bodies.description: Advises the Library Director on library issues and serves as liaison between Durham County Library and the community.
bodies.location: Various Durham County Library branches

bodies.name: Department of Social Services Board
bodies.description: Responsible for Durham County social services administration, including selecting the DSS Director and setting policy.
bodies.location: Hybrid

bodies.name: Durham Cultural Advisory Board
bodies.description: Joint advisory body to City Council and BOCC on arts funding, public art, and cultural development.
bodies.location: General Services Dept., Room 141, 2011 Fay St., Durham

bodies.name: Open Space and Trails Commission
bodies.description: Advises City Council and BOCC on open space preservation and trail development.
bodies.location: Virtual / Durham City Hall Committee Room

bodies.name: Homeless Services Advisory Committee
bodies.description: Provides guidance to county and city leadership on initiatives to prevent and end homelessness in Durham.
bodies.location: 414 E. Main St., Durham, Conference Room C

bodies.name: Joint City-County Planning Committee
bodies.description: Expedites joint City and County consideration of planning issues affecting both governments.
bodies.location: 101 City Hall Plaza, Durham, Committee Room

bodies.name: Workforce Development Board
bodies.description: Local policy body responsible for planning, oversight, and coordination of workforce development initiatives.
bodies.location: 423 Morris Street, Durham (Durham Housing Authority)

bodies.name: Human Relations Commission
bodies.description: Provides forums and workshops to improve community relations and address discrimination concerns in Durham.
bodies.location: Durham City Hall

bodies.name: Farmland Protection Advisory Board
bodies.description: Promotes protection of Durham County's farmland and forests to balance development with preservation of agricultural resources.
bodies.location: Durham Farm Bureau, 1901 Hillandale Rd., Suite 105

bodies.name: Opioid Settlement Advisory Committee
bodies.description: Reviews funding proposals aligned with the national opioid litigation settlement for Durham County.
bodies.location: Virtual (YouTube livestream)

bodies.name: Raleigh-Durham Airport Authority
bodies.description: Governs Raleigh-Durham International Airport with representatives from Durham City, Durham County, Raleigh, and Wake County.
bodies.location: RDU Airport Center, 1000 Trade Drive, Durham

bodies.name: Durham Technical Community College Board of Trustees
bodies.description: Supervises the administration of Durham Technical Community College.
bodies.location: Durham Tech Main Campus, Lyon Board Room, 1637 E. Lawson St.

bodies.name: ABC Board
bodies.description: Policy-making body appointed by County Commissioners to oversee Durham ABC stores and enforcement.
bodies.location: Durham ABC Office, 3620 Shannon Rd., Suite 200

bodies.name: Citizens Advisory Committee
bodies.description: Advises City Council and BOCC on housing and community development needs funded by HUD block grants.
bodies.location: 101 City Hall Plaza, Durham, Conference Room 1A

bodies.name: Recreation Advisory Commission
bodies.description: Works with Parks & Recreation Director on recommendations for recreational programs, facilities, and community needs.
bodies.location: Durham Parks & Recreation, 400 Cleveland St.
